name: Spectre Vigil
short_description: Spectre Vigil is an Observation-Duty style horror game with a unique twist: Detecting ghosts! Spot many different abnormalities and handle terrifying entities, all whilst keeping track of what happens and figuring out what ails this location!
detailed_description:
Spectre Vigil is an Observation-Duty style horror game with a unique twist: Detecting ghosts! Spot many different abnormalities and handle terrifying entities, all whilst keeping track of what happens and figuring out what plagues these haunted halls!

Each and every round, a mortifying haunt will inhabit the very halls you stare at, and cause them to suddenly change! Be it as simple as a chair sliding backwards or as monstrous as a lovecraftian bird-horror in the basement, it's your job to not only find these issues, but recognize a pattern from them, and determine exactly what is going to cause this poor rent-payer's apartment to collapse. If you fail? Well....

I'm sure the devil is hiring.

Featuring

  • Nearly 300 Different Abnormalities

  • Two Fully unique locations with special mechanics

  • Six terrifying haunts with complex abilities and patterns

  • A hand-written journal full of flavor, hints, and more
